WEBUI_PORT.name: WebUI Port
WEBUI_PORT.description: Port where the qBittorrent web interface is exposed. Default: 8080.

TORRENTING_PORT.name: Torrenting Port
TORRENTING_PORT.description: Port used for peer connections (TCP and UDP). Default: 6881.

PUID.name: User ID (PUID)
PUID.description: UID the process runs as. Use 1000 for the default HA user.

PGID.name: Group ID (PGID)
PGID.description: GID the process runs as. Use 1000 for the default HA group.

TZ.name: Timezone
TZ.description: System timezone, e.g. Europe/Madrid or America/New_York.

media_folders.name: Media Folders
media_folders.description: Folders available to qBittorrent. Add or remove paths here (must start with /media or /share). The first entry becomes the default save path. Restart the add-on to apply changes.

cpu_percent.name: CPU Limit (%)
cpu_percent.description: Maximum CPU usage for qBittorrent (1–100). Set to 100 to disable throttling.

memory_mb.name: Memory Limit (MB)
memory_mb.description: Maximum RAM in MB that qBittorrent may use. Set to 0 for no limit.
